name: Pineapple French Toast with Ambrosia Salsa
recipeIngredient: Pineapple chunks or tidbits (20 oz), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine halved strawberries, pineapple chunks, coconut, and sugar. Reserve 3/4 cup of the pineapple juice.
2. Slice bread into 3/4 inch slices (10 oz total).
3. Place bread slices in a single layer on a jelly roll pan.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the bread, ensuring each slice is completely coated.
5. Cover and refrigerate overnight or until all liquid is absorbed.
6. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
7. Cook bread pieces one at a time, turning to brown both sides.
8. Serve with reserved Ambrosia Salsa.
